title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple pull/run interface.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library that wraps the Ollama REST API, letting you chat with local models in a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers, providing the same ergonomic API as the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that turns any Ollama model into a drop-in LLM for chains, agents, RAG, tool-calling, etc.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (ChatGPT-style) that connects to a local Ollama instance; supports multi-user, RAG, code highlighting.

title: ollama4j – Java Client
summary: Unofficial but mature Java/Kotlin SDK exposing chat, embeddings, model management and streaming via simple builders.

title: ollama-rag – Minimal RAG Starter
summary: Python repo showing how to combine Ollama embeddings + Chroma to build a question-answering bot over your documents.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets a server chat with any local Ollama model, including slash-commands and thread support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart that deploys Ollama server + WebUI onto any Kubernetes cluster with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-tools – Function-calling PoC
summary: Experimental repo demonstrating how to add OpenAI-style function-calling capabilities to models served by Ollama.

title: ollama-gui (electron)
summary: Lightweight Electron desktop app that wraps the Ollama API into a native chat window with markdown and code rendering.

title: ollama-copilot – VS-Code extension
summary: Neovim plugin (also VS-Code port) that turns any Ollama model into a free inline coding assistant with slash-commands.

title: haystack-ollama – Haystack Integration
summary: Official Haystack component letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production-grade pipelines.

title: ollama-nim – Nim Client
summary: Lightweight Nimble package that exposes the full Ollama REST API with async/await and streams.

title: ollama-rust – Rust Client
summary: Community Rust crate offering strongly-typed chat, embeddings and model management with Tokio async support.

title: ollama-csharp – .NET SDK
summary: Unofficial C# library that wraps the Ollama API for .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming and dependency injection.

title: reddit/r/ollama – Community Discussion
summary: Active subreddit for sharing tips, custom Modelfiles, performance benchmarks and ecosystem announcements.

title: Hacker News: Show HN – Ollama WebUI
summary: Discussion thread comparing Ollama to other local LLM stacks and showcasing the open-source WebUI project.
